props.name: label
props.description: Accessible, visible label; override with the default slot.

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name; the value is submitted under it when checked.

props.name: value
props.description: Value submitted with the form when checked.

props.name: required
props.description: Mark the control required for native form validation.

props.name: onCheckedChange
props.description: Called whenever the checked value changes.
